mapper.insert:
select SEQ_BLOG.nextval from dual
insert into blog( blog_no, blog_title, blog_content, blog_writer, blog_date, blog_hit )values ( #{blogNo}, #{blogTitle}, #{blogContent}, #{blogWriter}, sysdate, 0 )
mapper.update: update blog set blog_hit = blog_hit + 1 where blog_no = #{blogNo}
mapper.select: select b.blog_no, blog_title, blog_content, blog_writer, blog_date, blog_hit, (select mem_profileimg from BLOGMEMBER bm where b.blog_writer = bm.mem_id) mem_profileimg, (select count(blog_no) from blogfile bbf where b.blog_no = bbf.blog_no) file_cnt, file_no,file_name,file_mime,file_fancysize,file_savepath from blog b left outer join blogfile bf on (b.blog_no = bf.blog_no) where b.blog_no = #{blogNo} order by b.blog_no desc
